sections.description: Synchronizes clinic and doctor data from the PR360 API into WordPress clinic and doctor post types used by the 360 medical site network.
sections.installation:
1. Upload the plugin folder to /wp-content/plugins/360-api-sync/ or install via Plugins → Add New → Upload Plugin.
  2. Activate the plugin.
  3. Open 360 API Sync → Settings, configure API fields, and run manual sync.
sections.changelog:
1.5.1

  • Added top-level clinic meta writes for primary address fields: clinic_city, clinic_state, clinic_zip, clinic_lat, clinic_lng, clinic_latitude, and clinic_longitude.
  • Improves compatibility with state-map templates that read separate city/state/lat/lng meta keys instead of nested address arrays.

1.5.0

  • Clinics with a valid organization_id but no clinic_name are now skipped — prevents Temporary Clinic xxxxxxxx records from being created.

1.4.9

  • Clinics missing organization_id are now skipped entirely instead of being created as temporary placeholder records.

1.4.8

  • Added temporary address debug logging to error_log to capture the exact API payload shape for address fields.

1.4.7

  • Fixed address composition when API returns addresses array items as plain strings — each string line is now converted to an array and merged with top-level clinic fields (city/state/zip/lat/lng) before normalization.
  • Full city, state, and zip now appear in clinic_address and clinic_addresses for map pin usage across all API payload shapes.

1.4.6

  • Updated address backfill logic so unchanged clinics are reprocessed when saved clinic_addresses differs from normalized incoming API data.
  • Allows partial legacy addresses to be replaced with full street/city/state/zip values on sync.

1.4.5

  • Added fallback address mapping from top-level API fields (street/city/state/zip) into clinic_addresses.
  • Merges missing city/state/zip/coordinates into partial address rows so the single WordPress clinic address field is fully composed for map pin usage.

1.4.4

  • Fixed temporary clinic fallback matching by name to use a valid WordPress query path and exact title comparison.
  • Prevents duplicate temporary clinic creation when records are missing organization_id but clinic names are unchanged.

1.4.3

  • Filtered placeholder/empty About repeater rows so unused entries no longer render on clinic pages.
  • Improved clinic info backfill detection to overwrite legacy placeholder-only values on the next sync.

1.4.2

  • Fixed image importer extension handling to preserve .svg files instead of forcing unsupported URLs to .jpg.
  • Added MIME fallback mapping so SVG imports are saved with image/svg+xml when needed.

1.4.1

  • Removed the Enable Mock API and Dry Run Mode settings from admin to keep live behavior consistent.
  • Forced runtime settings to keep both mock and dry-run disabled.

1.4.0

  • Switched to a manifest-based GitHub updater (main branch ZIP) to match the 360 blocks updater pattern.
  • Added in-plugin updater integration that provides plugin information and update responses from plugin-manifest.json.
  • Added package-folder rename handling during update to preserve the 360-api-sync plugin directory.
